leadText: Humilau City (Japanese: セイガイハシティ Seigaiha City) is a city in northeastern Unova. It is the location of the Humilau Gym, with the Gym Leader Marlon.

sections.title: Slogan
sections.text: Slogan [ edit | edit source ] Calm and Sparkling Seas (Japanese: 表すは 穏やかな 海 Represents the calm sea. )

sections.title: Places of interest
sections.text: Places of interest [ edit | edit source ] Humilau Gym [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Humilau Gym The Humilau Gym is the official Gym of Humilau City. The Gym specializes in Water-type Pokémon. The Gym Leader is Marlon . Trainers who defeat him receive the Wave Badge . Move Tutor [ edit | edit source ] The Move Tutor here is located in the first house along the boardwalk from Humilau Gym to Route 22. He will teach a total of 13 moves for Yellow Shards . In these games, he is the only Shard Move Tutor to not teach a move introduced in Generation V . Move Type Cat.
